scheme_name: HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth
exit_load: Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days.
about_fund:
About HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth is a Commodities Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Arun Agarwal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,37,048 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 04 Jun 2026 is ₹48.46.
The HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth is rated High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days.
